AI Chatbot
Ask anything — CVE analysis, scan results, dashboard features, security advice.
Welcome to CyberINK AI.
You can ask me to:
• Evaluate a CVE (e.g. Explain CVE-2024-1234)
• Interpret scan findings (e.g. What does HIGH risk mean?)
• Explain any dashboard feature
• Provide security hardening advice
Domain Health & Search Console

Website File Scanner
Checks for malware, exposed sensitive files, suspicious uploads, and security misconfigurations — supports WordPress, Drupal, Joomla, Laravel, Django, and any web application.
Mark all as:
Scanning… this may take 15–30 seconds.
Select a platform, enter the site URL, and click Scan Now.
Quick Actions
Apply Cloudflare protections instantly to a zone.
Under Attack Mode
Show your site visitors a non-interactive JS challenge once your domain is active on Cloudflare. Blocks most bots and scripts while letting real browsers through.
About Under Attack Mode ↗
Requires a Cloudflare API token with Zone Settings:Edit permission. Manage tokens ↗

Connect & Scan with Agent
Enter your URL, optionally provide hosting credentials for a deeper authenticated scan, then pick an AI agent.
App Password enables full REST API auth. Generate in WP Admin → Users → Profile → Application Passwords.
Connects via cPanel UAPI (port 2083) to audit PHP version, SSL, email accounts, MySQL users, cron jobs, and file permissions.
Enables full server-side audit: config files, world-writable PHP, backup files, running services, firewall rules, brute-force evidence.
Scans the webroot for exposed .env files, wp-config.php, backup/SQL dumps, and PHP shells in the uploads directory.
Reads wp_simple_history and similar log tables directly. Enable Remote MySQL in Hostinger hPanel → Databases → Remote MySQL and add your IP.
Authenticates via Drupal's JSON:API to audit installed modules, user roles, update status, and security configuration.
Connects via Joomla Web Services API to audit extensions, user accounts, 2FA status, and core security settings.
For any web application with a login page. The agent will attempt form-based authentication and check for common security misconfigurations.
Connects via Plesk REST API (port 8443) to audit hosted domains, SSL certificates, PHP versions, and server configuration.
Audits PostgreSQL for weak roles, excessive public schema privileges, unencrypted connections, and dangerous extensions.
Checks for unauthenticated access, world-readable collections, missing auth enforcement, and exposed admin interfaces on port 27017.
Audits Firestore/Realtime DB security rules, unauthenticated read/write access, Storage bucket permissions, and Auth provider configuration.
Tests for no-auth access, protected-mode disabled, dangerous commands (KEYS, FLUSHALL, CONFIG), and sensitive session/token data exposure.
Audits SQL Server for weak sa accounts, xp_cmdshell enabled, linked servers, excessive sysadmin roles, and unencrypted connections.
Credentials are used only for this scan session and are never stored in the database or transmitted externally.

Splunk HTTP Event Collector (HEC)
Forward Splunk events to CyberINK using the standard HEC protocol. No Splunk plugin required.
HEC Endpoint URL
HEC Token (admin only)
1
In Splunk, navigate to Settings → Data Inputs → HTTP Event Collector and add a new token. Set the Default Index to your preferred index.
2
Add a forwarding output in outputs.conf pointing to this CyberINK endpoint, or use the curl snippet below to test manually.
3
Configure Splunk Universal Forwarder or Heavy Forwarder to send to this HEC endpoint using your token.
Test with curl
Splunk outputs.conf snippet
Windows Event Log Forwarder
Run this PowerShell agent on any Windows host to continuously forward Security, System, and Application event logs into CyberINK.
Agent Ingest URL
1
Log into the Windows host as Administrator and open PowerShell 5.1+ (or PowerShell 7).
2
Copy the agent script below. The URL, username, and password fields are pre-filled with your session details. Save the script and run it.
3
The agent sends the last 100 events from each channel every 30 seconds. Install it as a Scheduled Task or Windows Service for continuous operation.
PowerShell Agent Script
Install as Scheduled Task (runs every 30s)
Generic REST Ingest
Any system capable of sending HTTP POST requests can forward logs. Authenticate first to get a session cookie, then POST log entries as JSON arrays.
JSON schema (single entry or array)
Add Log Source
Connect a new host or system to forward logs into CyberINK

Run the PowerShell forwarder script on any Windows host. It reads Security, System, and Application event channels and sends batches to CyberINK every 30 seconds using your HEC token — no interactive login required.

1. Save this script on the Windows host
2. Run it (or register as Scheduled Task)

Forward Linux system logs using rsyslog or journald. The snippet below configures rsyslog to forward all facility.severity messages to CyberINK via HTTP using your HEC token.

/etc/rsyslog.d/99-cyberink.conf
Reload rsyslog
sudo systemctl restart rsyslog
Alternative — journald one-liner (systemd)

Point a Splunk Universal Forwarder or Heavy Forwarder at CyberINK's HEC endpoint. No Splunk plugin required — just configure an outputs.conf stanza.

$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/system/local/outputs.conf
Test with curl from the Splunk host

Any system that can make HTTP POST requests can send logs. Use the HEC token in the Authorization header — no session login required.

curl example
Python example

Analyzing logs…
Simple History has a free REST API — install it so agents can read login events directly. WP Activity Log (WSAL) gives a richer admin UI but its REST API requires the paid PRO version. Generate an Application Password at: WP Admin → Users → Profile → Application Passwords.
cPanel Database Access (no WordPress auth needed) click to expand ▼
Reads wp-config.php via cPanel Fileman, runs a temp PHP script to query Simple History tables directly, then deletes it. No WordPress credentials needed.
For Hostinger or direct MySQL access, use the Hostinger / MySQL tab.
Fetching live WordPress events…
Timestamp User Event IP Address Severity Source
Enter your WordPress URL and credentials, then click Fetch Live Events.
Fetches Drupal watchdog (dblog) events via JSON:API. Requires the JSON:API core module enabled and admin credentials.
Fetching Drupal watchdog logs…
Timestamp Type Severity Message User IP
Enter your Drupal site URL and credentials, then click Fetch Watchdog Logs.
Fetches Joomla action logs via the Web Services API (Joomla 4+). Generate an API token at: Joomla Admin → Users → your user → Joomla API Token.
Fetching Joomla action logs…
Timestamp User Action Item IP Extension
Enter your Joomla site URL and credentials, then click Fetch Action Logs.
Reads any log file on your server via SSH — Nginx/Apache access logs, Laravel/Django app logs, PM2 logs, systemd journal, etc. Common paths: /var/log/nginx/access.log · /var/log/apache2/access.log · storage/logs/laravel.log · /var/log/syslog
Fetching log file via SSH…
# Log Line Flag
Enter SSH credentials and a log file path, then click Fetch Logs.
Fetches active sessions and last login IP via cPanel UAPI. Generate an API Token at: cPanel → Security → Manage API Tokens. API tokens are more secure than passwords.
Fetching cPanel sessions…
Timestamp User Event / Session Type IP Address Status Source
Enter your cPanel host and credentials, then click Fetch Active Sessions.
DB Host must be the remote Hostinger hostname, NOT "localhost"
Step 1: hPanel → Databases → MySQL Databases → copy the Database Server field (e.g. auth-db1234.hstgr.io)
Step 2: hPanel → Databases → Remote MySQL → add your VPS/dashboard server IP
Step 3: Paste the DB Server hostname above (not localhost), fill in DB Name, Username, Password → click Fetch

Reads Simple History + Wordfence login/block/issue tables. After connecting, User Activity Logs and Plugin Inventory auto-load from MySQL. MySQL credentials saved
Connecting to MySQL…
Timestamp User Event IP Address Severity Source
Enter your Hostinger MySQL credentials, then click Fetch via MySQL.
Shows WordPress WP-LOG events captured during previous scans. For real-time events, use the WordPress Admin tab above.
Loading login events…
Timestamp Username Event IP Address Country Status Target
Click "Load from Scan History" to fetch WordPress login events captured during scans.
Get your API Token at dash.cloudflare.com → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token (use Security Insights:Read permission). Account ID is visible in the URL: dash.cloudflare.com/ACCOUNT_ID/...
Fetching Cloudflare Security Insights…
Severity Description Subject Insight type Scan performed on Details
Enter your Cloudflare API token and account ID, then click Fetch Security Insights.
Connect via FTP to browse files, scan for malware patterns (eval, base64_decode, gzinflate), or read server access logs. Works with Hostinger, cPanel, and any standard FTP host.

Name Modified Size Type Flag

Grafana Monitor NO SSH REQUIRED
Live server metrics, traffic & uptime via Prometheus + Node Exporter — topology diagrams rendered directly in Grafana
Installing Grafana + Prometheus + Windows Exporter…
A setup window has opened — accept the UAC (admin) prompt to allow installation. CyberINK will auto-connect once Grafana is ready.
Waiting for Grafana to come online…
Connecting to Grafana and Prometheus…
Grafana Dashboard
↗ Open
Anonymous access not enabled — Grafana login page will appear instead of the dashboard.
Prometheus Targets
Active Alerts
Quick Setup — Ubuntu / Debian
1
Install Grafana
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y grafana sudo systemctl enable grafana-server && sudo systemctl start grafana-server # Open http://YOUR_IP:3000 → admin / admin
2
Enable iframe embedding (grafana.ini)
[auth.anonymous] enabled = true org_name = Main Org. org_role = Viewer [security] allow_embedding = true
Then: sudo systemctl restart grafana-server
3
Install Prometheus + Windows Exporter (Windows) or Node Exporter (Linux)
# Windows — use Auto-Setup button above (installs Grafana + Prometheus + Windows Exporter) # Linux: sudo apt install -y prometheus prometheus-node-exporter sudo systemctl enable --now prometheus prometheus-node-exporter
4
Prometheus scrape config (prometheus.yml)
scrape_configs: - job_name: 'windows' # Windows Exporter static_configs: - targets: ['localhost:9182'] # - job_name: 'node' # Linux Node Exporter # static_configs: # - targets: ['localhost:9100']
5
Connect Grafana → Prometheus
Grafana → Connections → Data Sources → Add → Prometheus → URL: http://localhost:9090
6
Import recommended dashboards (Grafana.com)
Or: Grafana → Dashboards → Import → enter ID above

Risk Management & Audit Control Platform
Track and treat your organisation's security risks in line with ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS Controls, SOC 2, and GDPR.
1. Controls → 2. Risk Register → 3. Treatment → 4. Tests → 5. Audits → 6. Reports
Controls — Map your controls to compliance frameworks. Assign owners and monitor implementation status per framework requirement.
Risk Register — Log every identified risk. Risk Score = Likelihood × Impact (1–25). Scores ≥16 = Critical, 10–15 = High, 5–9 = Medium, 1–4 = Low.
Treatment — Choose Mitigate (reduce), Accept (document & approve), Transfer (insure/outsource), or Avoid (eliminate). Set a due date and owner.
Tests — Create manual or automated tests that verify controls are operating. Link each test to a control reference (e.g. ISO A.5.1).
Audits — Schedule internal or external audits, track evidence collection, and log findings with a timeline of audit activity.
Reports — Export compliance evidence packages for ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI DSS, and other frameworks from your live data.
Controls
Manage and track your security controls across frameworks. Assign owners and monitor implementation status.

Meet Our Agents
CyberINK deploys 11 specialised security testing agents, each mapped to the OWASP Web Security Testing Guide (WSTG). Every agent runs real shell commands — no hardcoded results.
Recon Scout
Passive & Active Reconnaissance
Performs deep passive intelligence gathering before touching the target. Runs WHOIS, DNS enumeration, certificate transparency, Wayback Machine, Shodan, HackerTarget, URLScan, AlienVault OTX, and subdomain discovery. Then moves to active HTTP fingerprinting via a 9-layer Cloudflare bypass cascade.
Covers
INFO-02 Server FingerprintINFO-06 Entry Points INFO-07 JS Bundle AnalysisINFO-08 Framework Headers INFO-09 App FingerprintINFO-10 Architecture Map Port ScanService Detection Dir Brute-forceNuclei Tech Scan
JS Secret Hunter
JavaScript & Source Code Analysis
Fetches every JS bundle referenced on the target page and scans for hardcoded secrets — API keys, tokens, credentials, internal URLs, and exposed GraphQL endpoints. Uses the built-in hunt_js_secrets tool for entropy-based pattern matching across minified bundles.
Covers
Hardcoded SecretsAPI Key Exposure Internal Endpoint LeakageSource Map Exposure
Config Auditor
Infrastructure & Deployment Security
Audits HTTP security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.), detects exposed admin panels and management interfaces, checks cloud storage buckets for public access, tests for DNS zone transfer vulnerabilities, and probes for open redirect flaws. Leads with a full Nuclei misconfiguration scan.
Covers
HTTP Security HeadersExposed Admin Panels Cloud Storage MisconfigDNS Zone Transfer Open RedirectSubdomain Takeover
Identity Mapper
User Roles & Account Enumeration
Enumerates user roles and privilege levels visible on the application. Tests registration flows, account provisioning processes, username enumeration via timing and error message differences, and enforces username policy checks with boundary values and special characters.
Covers
IDNT-01 Role DefinitionsIDNT-02 Registration IDNT-03 ProvisioningIDNT-04 User Enumeration IDNT-05 Username Policy
Auth Prober
Authentication & Credential Security
Tests the full authentication attack surface: credential transport over HTTP vs HTTPS, default and weak passwords, account lockout thresholds, auth schema bypasses via header injection, weak password policies, security question flaws, password reset token predictability, alternative channel weaknesses, and MFA presence and bypass vectors.
Covers
Default CredentialsAccount Lockout Auth BypassPassword Policy Password Reset FlawsMFA Detection Alternative Auth Channels
Access Control Tester
Authorization & Privilege Escalation
Probes for broken access control: path traversal and file inclusion, direct access to admin-only endpoints without authentication, vertical privilege escalation via role-manipulation payloads, IDOR across user/order/invoice resources, RBAC boundary testing, mass assignment via privileged field injection, and OAuth/OIDC endpoint discovery.
Covers
Path TraversalAuth Schema Bypass Privilege EscalationIDOR Mass AssignmentRBAC Testing OAuth Weaknesses
Session Analyst
Cookie & Token Security
Audits session management end-to-end: session schema analysis, cookie security flags (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite), fixation attacks, CSRF token presence and SameSite enforcement, logout invalidation, session timeout enforcement, JWT handling including alg:none bypass, session token entropy measurement, and concurrent session policy.
Covers
Cookie FlagsSession Fixation CSRF TokensLogout Invalidation JWT / alg:none bypassToken Entropy Concurrent Sessions
Injection Hunter
SQLi, XSS, SSTI & Command Injection
Leads with 9,000+ Nuclei CVE templates, then manually tests reflected XSS, stored XSS, SQL injection (with sqlmap and manual error-detection), server-side code and command injection, SSTI (7*7=49 polyglot), SSRF against cloud metadata endpoints, XXE via XML-accepting endpoints and SOAP, malicious file upload bypass, and file-focused path traversal.
Covers
Reflected & Stored XSSSQL Injection Command InjectionSSTI SSRFXXE File Upload BypassPath Traversal
Crypto Inspector
TLS, Cipher & Key Security
Enumerates TLS versions and cipher suites with nmap, validates certificates (self-signed, expiry, SAN, chain trust), checks HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect and HSTS headers, tests whether login forms submit over plaintext HTTP, scans for exposed sensitive files and source repositories, hunts hardcoded API keys and secrets in JS bundles, and checks debug endpoints for credential leakage.
Covers
TLS/SSL ConfigCertificate Validation Data in TransitExposed Files (.env, .git) Hardcoded SecretsKey Management
Client-Side Analyst
Browser Security & DOM Vulnerabilities
Scans the DOM for dangerous sinks (innerHTML, eval, document.write), audits external JS includes for XSSI, tests HTML injection and open redirect via 15 common parameter names, inspects localStorage/sessionStorage usage patterns, detects outdated libraries (jQuery, Bootstrap, Lodash, etc.) with CVE cross-reference, checks for clickjacking protection, and probes WebSocket endpoints for missing Origin checks.
Covers
DOM XSSHTML Injection Open RedirectBrowser Storage Outdated JS LibrariesClickjacking WebSocket Origin CheckXSSI / JSONP
API Security Tester
REST, GraphQL & OWASP API Top 10
The most comprehensive agent — covers all 10 OWASP API Security Top 10 categories. Discovers API endpoints and documentation, tests BOLA/IDOR across object IDs, checks authentication bypass and JWT alg:none, measures rate limiting on auth endpoints (20-request burst), tests BFLA via HTTP verb tampering, mass assignment via privileged field injection, CORS misconfiguration, API injection (SQLi/NoSQLi/SSTI), deprecated version discovery, and error verbosity. Also runs GraphQL introspection and WordPress REST API deep audits with automatic credential discovery.
Covers
API-1 BOLA/IDORAPI-2 Broken Auth API-3 Data ExposureAPI-4 Rate Limiting API-5 BFLAAPI-6 Mass Assignment API-7 CORS / Docs ExposureAPI-8 Injection API-9 Asset ManagementAPI-10 Logging GraphQL IntrospectionWordPress REST API

Kebijakan Berlangganan & PenagihanSubscription & Billing Policy  •  Kebijakan PrivasiPrivacy Policy
Catatan Administrator:Administrator note: Penetapan paket dikelola per pengguna di Manajemen Pengguna. Pilih pengguna dan gunakan kolom Plan untuk beralih antara Basic dan Pro. Plan assignments are managed per-user in User Management. Select a user and use the Plan column to switch between Basic and Pro.
← Kembali ke Pricing PlansBack to Pricing Plans
Kebijakan Berlangganan & PenagihanSubscription & Billing Policy
Berlaku sejak: 1 Januari 2026  •  Terakhir diperbarui: 17 Mei 2026Effective: 1 January 2026  •  Last updated: 17 May 2026
Dengan menggunakan layanan CyberINK paket Pro, Anda menyetujui ketentuan penagihan dan berlangganan yang tercantum dalam kebijakan ini. Harap baca dengan seksama sebelum melakukan pembayaran. By using CyberINK Pro services, you agree to the billing and subscription terms set out in this policy. Please read carefully before making any payment.

1. Deskripsi Layanan dan Paket1. Service and Plan Description

CyberINK menyediakan platform keamanan berbasis kecerdasan buatan (AI) yang dirancang untuk organisasi yang membutuhkan pemantauan ancaman, pengujian keamanan web, dan manajemen kerentanan secara terpusat.CyberINK provides an AI-powered security platform designed for organisations that require centralised threat monitoring, web security testing, and vulnerability management.

1.1 Paket Basic (Gratis)1.1 Basic Plan (Free)

Paket Basic tersedia tanpa biaya dan mencakup fitur-fitur pemantauan keamanan inti. Paket ini tidak memerlukan informasi pembayaran dan dapat digunakan tanpa batas waktu selama akun aktif dan mematuhi Kebijakan Penggunaan yang Dapat Diterima.The Basic plan is available at no cost and includes core security monitoring features. No payment information is required; the plan can be used indefinitely while the account remains active and complies with the Acceptable Use Policy.

  • Security Dashboard & KPI Overview
  • Asisten AI Chatbot, Log Explorer, Manajemen InsidenAI Chatbot Assistant, Log Explorer, Incident Management
  • Analitik Ancaman, MITRE ATT&CK, GRC ComplianceThreat Analytics, MITRE ATT&CK, GRC Compliance
  • Inventaris, Monitor Jaringan, Scanner File WordPressInventories, Network Monitor, WordPress File Scanner
  • Skor Keamanan & Tindakan PrioritasSecure Score & Priority Actions

1.2 Paket Pro (Berbayar)1.2 Pro Plan (Paid)

Paket Pro mencakup semua fitur Basic ditambah akses ke Security Scanner, manajemen hasil scan, dan analitik ancaman mendalam. Paket ini dikenakan biaya berlangganan per pengguna (per seat).The Pro plan includes all Basic features plus access to the Security Scanner, scan results management, and advanced threat analytics. A per-user (per-seat) subscription fee applies.

  • Security Scanner — pemindaian AI penuh terhadap target URL menggunakan 11 agen WSTGSecurity Scanner — full AI-powered scanning against any target URL using 11 WSTG agents
  • Scan Results — riwayat temuan lengkap per target, checklist OWASP WSTG 69 itemScan Results — full findings history per target, 69-item OWASP WSTG checklist
  • Scan Analytics — tren ancaman, distribusi severity, analitik deret waktuScan Analytics — threat trends, severity distribution, time-series analytics
  • Rekomendasi remediasi otomatis dari output scanAutomated remediation recommendations from scan output
  • Hingga 50 scan/bulan per penggunaUp to 50 scans/month per user
  • Dukungan prioritas via email dengan waktu respons < 24 jam kerjaPriority email support with response time < 24 business hours

2. Harga dan Mata Uang2. Pricing and Currency

Seluruh harga dinyatakan dalam Rupiah Indonesia (IDR) dan sudah termasuk Pajak Pertambahan Nilai (PPN) sebesar 11% sesuai peraturan perpajakan Indonesia yang berlaku.All prices are in Indonesian Rupiah (IDR) and include Value Added Tax (VAT) of 11% in accordance with applicable Indonesian tax regulations.

PaketPlanHarga BulananMonthly PriceHarga TahunanAnnual PricePenghematanSavings
BasicGratisFreeGratisFree—
Pro (per seat)Rp 299.000 / bulanmonthRp 2.690.000 / tahunyear~Rp 898.000 (25%)
Pro — 5 seatRp 1.349.000 / bulanmonthRp 12.105.000 / tahunyear~Rp 4.083.000 (25%)
Pro — 10 seatRp 2.499.000 / bulanmonthRp 22.490.000 / tahunyear~Rp 7.498.000 (25%)

Harga dapat berubah sewaktu-waktu. Pelanggan aktif akan diberitahu paling lambat 30 hari sebelum perubahan harga berlaku melalui email yang terdaftar.Prices may change at any time. Active subscribers will be notified no later than 30 days before any price change takes effect via their registered email.

3. Siklus Penagihan3. Billing Cycle

3.1 Berlangganan Bulanan3.1 Monthly Subscription

Tagihan diproses setiap bulan pada tanggal yang sama dengan tanggal aktivasi awal. Pembayaran jatuh tempo di awal setiap periode penagihan (di muka). Jika tanggal penagihan jatuh pada hari libur atau akhir pekan, tagihan akan diproses pada hari kerja berikutnya.Billing is processed monthly on the same date as the initial activation. Payment is due at the beginning of each billing period (in advance). If the billing date falls on a public holiday or weekend, billing will be processed on the next business day.

3.2 Berlangganan Tahunan3.2 Annual Subscription

Tagihan diproses sekaligus untuk 12 bulan di muka. Berlangganan tahunan memberikan penghematan 25% dibandingkan tarif bulanan. Perpanjangan tahunan akan ditagih otomatis 7 hari sebelum masa berlangganan berakhir kecuali pelanggan membatalkan lebih awal.Billing is processed in a single payment for 12 months in advance. Annual subscriptions provide a 25% saving compared to the monthly rate. Annual renewals will be billed automatically 7 days before the subscription ends unless the subscriber cancels earlier.

3.3 Penambahan Seat3.3 Adding Seats

Penambahan seat di tengah periode penagihan akan dihitung secara prorata berdasarkan sisa hari dalam periode tersebut. Tagihan prorata akan ditambahkan ke tagihan berikutnya.Seats added mid-billing period will be charged on a prorated basis for the remaining days in that period. The prorated charge will be added to the next invoice.

4. Metode Pembayaran4. Payment Methods

CyberINK menerima metode pembayaran berikut:CyberINK accepts the following payment methods:

  • Transfer Bank:Bank Transfer: BCA, BNI, BRI, Mandiri, BSI
  • Virtual Account: Tersedia untuk semua bank di atas melalui gateway pembayaranAvailable for all banks above via payment gateway
  • QRIS: Pembayaran via aplikasi dompet digital yang mendukung QRIS (GoPay, OVO, DANA, LinkAja, ShopeePay)Payment via digital wallet apps supporting QRIS (GoPay, OVO, DANA, LinkAja, ShopeePay)
  • Kartu Kredit/Debit:Credit/Debit Card: Visa, Mastercard (melalui payment gateway tersertifikasi PCI-DSS)Visa, Mastercard (via PCI-DSS certified payment gateway)
  • Invoice Perusahaan:Corporate Invoice: Tersedia untuk langganan 5 seat ke atas, dengan termin pembayaran NET-15Available for 5+ seat subscriptions, with NET-15 payment terms

CyberINK tidak menyimpan data kartu kredit secara langsung. Seluruh transaksi kartu diproses oleh payment gateway yang telah tersertifikasi PCI-DSS Level 1.CyberINK does not store credit card data directly. All card transactions are processed by a PCI-DSS Level 1 certified payment gateway.

5. Pembatalan dan Kebijakan Pengembalian Dana5. Cancellation and Refund Policy

5.1 Pembatalan Berlangganan Bulanan5.1 Monthly Subscription Cancellation

Pelanggan dapat membatalkan berlangganan bulanan kapan saja. Pembatalan akan berlaku efektif pada akhir periode penagihan yang sedang berjalan. Tidak ada pengembalian dana untuk bulan yang sedang berjalan; akses Pro tetap aktif hingga akhir periode.Subscribers may cancel their monthly subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refund is issued for the current month; Pro access remains active until the end of the period.

5.2 Pembatalan Berlangganan Tahunan5.2 Annual Subscription Cancellation

Berlangganan tahunan dapat dibatalkan dalam 14 hari kalender sejak tanggal pembayaran untuk mendapatkan pengembalian dana penuh (full refund). Setelah 14 hari, tidak ada pengembalian dana untuk sisa masa berlangganan tahunan.Annual subscriptions may be cancelled within 14 calendar days of the payment date for a full refund. After 14 days, no refund is available for the remaining annual subscription period.

5.3 Pengecualian Pengembalian Dana5.3 Refund Exclusions

Pengembalian dana tidak tersedia dalam kondisi berikut:Refunds are not available in the following circumstances:

  • Akun dihentikan karena pelanggaran Kebijakan Penggunaan yang Dapat DiterimaAccount terminated due to violation of the Acceptable Use Policy
  • Permintaan pengembalian dana diajukan setelah 14 hari untuk berlangganan tahunanRefund request submitted after 14 days for an annual subscription
  • Penggunaan fitur Pro telah dilakukan secara signifikan (lebih dari 10 sesi scan)Pro features have been used significantly (more than 10 scan sessions)

5.4 Proses Permintaan Pengembalian Dana5.4 Refund Request Process

Kirimkan permintaan pengembalian dana ke ngclaire75@gmail.com dengan subjek "Refund Request — [Username] — [Tanggal Pembayaran]". Proses pengembalian dana diselesaikan dalam 7–14 hari kerja melalui metode pembayaran asal.Send your refund request to ngclaire75@gmail.com with the subject "Refund Request — [Username] — [Payment Date]". Refunds are processed within 7–14 business days via the original payment method.

6. Batas Penggunaan (Fair Use)6. Usage Limits (Fair Use)

Paket Pro dirancang untuk penggunaan profesional yang wajar. Batas berikut berlaku per pengguna per bulan:The Pro plan is designed for reasonable professional use. The following limits apply per user per month:

Sumber DayaResourceBatas BulananMonthly LimitBiaya KelebihanOverage Fee
Sesi Scan Agen (WSTG)Agent Scan Sessions (WSTG)50 sesi50 sessionsRp 5.000 / sesi tambahanextra session
Pentest Engagement aktif bersamaanConcurrent Active Pentest Engagements10 engagementTidak tersedia; upgrade diperlukanNot available; upgrade required
Penyimpanan Laporan ScanScan Report Storage5 GBRp 15.000 / GB tambahanextra GB
Ekspor Laporan PDF/ExcelPDF/Excel Report ExportTidak terbatasUnlimited—

CyberINK berhak menangguhkan sementara akses Pro jika penggunaan terdeteksi melebihi batas wajar secara signifikan atau digunakan untuk tujuan yang melanggar hukum. Pemberitahuan akan dikirimkan terlebih dahulu melalui email kecuali pelanggaran bersifat kritis.CyberINK reserves the right to temporarily suspend Pro access if usage is detected to significantly exceed fair limits or is used for unlawful purposes. Prior notice will be sent by email unless the violation is critical.

7. Pembaruan dan Peningkatan Paket7. Plan Upgrades and Downgrades

Pengguna dapat melakukan upgrade dari Basic ke Pro kapan saja melalui administrator sistem. Downgrade dari Pro ke Basic akan berlaku di awal periode penagihan berikutnya. Data scan dan engagement yang dibuat selama paket Pro akan tetap dapat dibaca (read-only) setelah downgrade, namun fitur scan baru tidak dapat dijalankan.Users may upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time through the system administrator. Downgrading from Pro to Basic takes effect at the start of the next billing period. Scan and engagement data created during the Pro plan will remain readable (read-only) after downgrade, but new scan features cannot be run.

8. Jaminan Ketersediaan Layanan (SLA)8. Service Level Agreement (SLA)

CyberINK berkomitmen untuk menyediakan ketersediaan layanan (uptime) sebesar 99,5% per bulan untuk pengguna Pro, dihitung berdasarkan uptime server dashboard dan mesin agen scan.CyberINK commits to providing service availability (uptime) of 99.5% per month for Pro users, measured against the dashboard server and scan agent engine uptime.

  • Pemeliharaan terjadwal akan diumumkan paling lambat 48 jam sebelumnya dan tidak dihitung sebagai downtimeScheduled maintenance will be announced at least 48 hours in advance and does not count as downtime
  • Jika uptime aktual di bawah 99,5%, pelanggan Pro berhak mengajukan kredit layanan sebesar 5% dari tagihan bulan tersebut per setiap 0,5% penurunan uptimeIf actual uptime falls below 99.5%, Pro subscribers may claim a service credit of 5% of that month's bill for each 0.5% drop in uptime
  • Kredit layanan tidak dapat dikonversi menjadi uang tunaiService credits cannot be converted to cash

9. Penghentian Layanan9. Service Termination

CyberINK berhak menghentikan atau menangguhkan akun tanpa pemberitahuan terlebih dahulu jika:CyberINK reserves the right to terminate or suspend accounts without prior notice if:

  • Akun digunakan untuk melakukan pemindaian keamanan tanpa otorisasi pada sistem yang bukan milik penggunaThe account is used to perform unauthorised security scanning on systems not owned by the user
  • Akun terlibat dalam aktivitas ilegal atau melanggar hukum yang berlaku di IndonesiaThe account is involved in illegal activities or activities that violate laws applicable in Indonesia
  • Terdapat tunggakan pembayaran lebih dari 30 hariPayment arrears exceed 30 days

Dalam hal penghentian karena tunggakan, akses Pro akan dibekukan dan akun akan diturunkan ke paket Basic. Data tidak akan dihapus selama 90 hari; pelanggan dapat mengaktifkan kembali dengan melunasi tunggakan.In cases of termination due to arrears, Pro access will be frozen and the account downgraded to Basic. Data will not be deleted for 90 days; subscribers may reactivate by settling the outstanding balance.

10. Hukum yang Berlaku10. Governing Law

Kebijakan ini tunduk pada hukum Republik Indonesia, termasuk namun tidak terbatas pada Undang-Undang No. 11 Tahun 2008 tentang Informasi dan Transaksi Elektronik (ITE) beserta perubahannya, dan peraturan perpajakan yang berlaku. Setiap sengketa yang timbul akan diselesaikan melalui mediasi terlebih dahulu, dan jika tidak mencapai kesepakatan, akan diselesaikan di Pengadilan Negeri Jakarta Pusat.This policy is governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia, including but not limited to Law No. 11 of 2008 on Electronic Information and Transactions (ITE) and its amendments, and applicable tax regulations. Any disputes shall first be resolved through mediation, and if no agreement is reached, through the Central Jakarta District Court.

11. Kontak11. Contact

Pertanyaan terkait penagihan dan berlangganan:Queries regarding billing and subscriptions:

  • Email: ngclaire75@gmail.com
  • Jam kerja: Senin – Jumat, 09.00 – 17.00 WIBBusiness hours: Monday – Friday, 09:00 – 17:00 WIB (UTC+7)
  • Waktu respons: < 1 hari kerja untuk paket Pro, < 3 hari kerja untuk paket BasicResponse time: < 1 business day for Pro plan, < 3 business days for Basic plan

Set your country so appointment costs are shown in your local currency. Rates are approximate and for display only.

By submitting this form you agree that your message and contact details will be used solely to respond to your enquiry. Refer to our Privacy Policy for details on data handling.
Book an Appointment
Schedule a consultation with our security specialists. Select the service that best suits your needs — our team will confirm and send you a Google Meet link for the session.
Dashboard Feature Training
Personalised walkthrough of CyberINK's security intelligence platform — dashboards, scanning tools, GRC controls, and reporting.

On-Site Cyber Security Audit
Comprehensive on-premises security assessment covering physical access controls, network segmentation, and endpoint security posture.
Typical duration: 2-4 hours
Manual Report Writing
Collaborative session to produce a customised security report — findings documentation, executive summary, risk ratings, and remediation recommendations.
Typical duration: 1.5-2 hours

Kebijakan PrivasiPrivacy Policy
Berlaku sejak: 1 Januari 2026  •  Terakhir diperbarui: 17 Mei 2026Effective: 1 January 2026  •  Last updated: 17 May 2026
CyberINK berkomitmen untuk melindungi privasi Anda. Kebijakan ini menjelaskan data apa yang kami kumpulkan, bagaimana kami menggunakannya, dan hak-hak Anda sebagai pengguna. Kami mematuhi Undang-Undang Pelindungan Data Pribadi (UU PDP) No. 27 Tahun 2022 dan prinsip-prinsip GDPR secara sukarela. CyberINK is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user. We comply with Indonesian Personal Data Protection Law (UU PDP) No. 27 of 2022 and voluntarily apply GDPR principles.

1. Identitas Pengendali Data1. Data Controller Identity

CyberINK bertindak sebagai Pengendali Data (Data Controller) atas seluruh data pribadi yang dikumpulkan melalui platform ini. Jika Anda memiliki pertanyaan tentang pemrosesan data pribadi Anda, hubungi:CyberINK acts as the Data Controller for all personal data collected through this platform. If you have questions about the processing of your personal data, please contact:

  • Data Protection Officer (DPO): ngclaire75@gmail.com
  • AlamatAddress: Surabaya, Indonesia

2. Data yang Kami Kumpulkan2. Data We Collect

2.1 Data Akun2.1 Account Data

Saat Anda membuat akun, kami mengumpulkan:When you create an account, we collect:

  • Nama pengguna (username)Username
  • Alamat email (opsional, diperlukan untuk verifikasi dan notifikasi)Email address (optional, required for verification and notifications)
  • Kata sandi yang dienkripsi menggunakan algoritma bcrypt (kami tidak pernah menyimpan kata sandi dalam bentuk teks biasa)Password encrypted using bcrypt (we never store passwords in plain text)
  • Peran akun (role: admin / user) dan paket berlanggananAccount role (admin / user) and subscription plan

2.2 Data Penggunaan Platform2.2 Platform Usage Data

Saat Anda menggunakan platform, kami mencatat:When you use the platform, we record:

  • Target pemindaian yang Anda masukkan (domain, URL, rentang IP) — disimpan di basis data lokal untuk riwayat scanScan targets you enter (domain, URL, IP range) — stored in the local database for scan history
  • Hasil pemindaian yang dihasilkan oleh agen AIScan results generated by AI agents
  • Waktu dan durasi sesi penggunaSession time and duration
  • Tindakan yang dilakukan di dalam platform (misalnya membuat engagement, menjalankan scan)Actions performed within the platform (e.g. creating engagements, running scans)
  • Preferensi tata letak dashboard yang disimpan di localStorage browser Anda (tidak dikirim ke server kami)Dashboard layout preferences stored in your browser's localStorage (not sent to our servers)

2.3 Data Teknis2.3 Technical Data

Secara otomatis kami mengumpulkan:We automatically collect:

  • Alamat IP pengguna yang terautentikasi (untuk log keamanan dan pencegahan penyalahgunaan)IP address of authenticated users (for security logs and abuse prevention)
  • Agen pengguna (User-Agent) browserBrowser User-Agent string
  • Waktu akses dan endpoint yang diakses (log akses server)Access time and endpoints accessed (server access logs)

2.4 Data Pembayaran2.4 Payment Data

Untuk pengguna Pro, data pembayaran (nomor kartu, informasi rekening) tidak disimpan oleh CyberINK. Seluruh transaksi keuangan diproses oleh payment gateway pihak ketiga yang tersertifikasi. Kami hanya menyimpan status pembayaran, tanggal transaksi, dan referensi ID transaksi untuk keperluan rekonsiliasi.For Pro users, payment data (card number, account details) is not stored by CyberINK. All financial transactions are processed by a certified third-party payment gateway. We only store payment status, transaction date, and transaction reference ID for reconciliation purposes.

3. Dasar Hukum Pemrosesan Data3. Legal Basis for Processing

Kami memproses data pribadi Anda berdasarkan:We process your personal data on the following grounds:

  • Pelaksanaan kontrak:Contract performance: data yang diperlukan untuk menyediakan layanan yang Anda berlangganandata required to provide the service you have subscribed to
  • Kepentingan sah (legitimate interest):Legitimate interest: keamanan platform, pencegahan penipuan, peningkatan layananplatform security, fraud prevention, service improvement
  • Kewajiban hukum:Legal obligation: kepatuhan terhadap peraturan perpajakan dan regulasi yang berlaku di Indonesiacompliance with Indonesian tax regulations and applicable law
  • Persetujuan:Consent: untuk komunikasi pemasaran (Anda dapat mencabut persetujuan kapan saja)for marketing communications (you may withdraw consent at any time)

4. Penggunaan Data4. Use of Data

Data yang kami kumpulkan digunakan semata-mata untuk tujuan berikut:Data we collect is used solely for the following purposes:

  • Menyediakan, mengoperasikan, dan meningkatkan platform CyberINKProviding, operating, and improving the CyberINK platform
  • Memverifikasi identitas dan mengautentikasi akses penggunaVerifying identity and authenticating user access
  • Mengirimkan notifikasi terkait layanan (misalnya verifikasi email, peringatan keamanan akun)Sending service-related notifications (e.g. email verification, account security alerts)
  • Mengelola penagihan dan berlanggananManaging billing and subscriptions
  • Mendeteksi, mencegah, dan menanggapi ancaman keamanan terhadap platformDetecting, preventing, and responding to security threats against the platform
  • Memenuhi kewajiban hukum dan regulasiFulfilling legal and regulatory obligations
  • Analitik penggunaan agregat dan anonim untuk pengembangan produkAggregate and anonymised usage analytics for product development

Kami tidak menggunakan data Anda untuk iklan pihak ketiga, dan kami tidak menjual data pribadi Anda kepada siapa pun.We do not use your data for third-party advertising, and we do not sell your personal data to anyone.

5. Berbagi Data dengan Pihak Ketiga5. Third-Party Data Sharing

Kami hanya berbagi data dengan pihak ketiga dalam kondisi terbatas berikut:We share data with third parties only in the following limited circumstances:

Pihak KetigaThird Party TujuanPurpose Data yang DibagikanData Shared
Cloudflare Inc. CDN, DDoS protection, DNS Traffic metadata, IP address
Payment Gateway (Midtrans/Xendit) Pemrosesan pembayaranPayment processing Informasi transaksi (bukan data kartu mentah)Transaction information (not raw card data)
Anthropic / OpenAI Model AI untuk chatbot & analisis laporanAI models for chatbot & report analysis Teks prompt yang Anda kirimkan ke fitur AIPrompt text you submit to AI features
SMTP Provider Pengiriman email notifikasiSending notification emails Alamat email tujuan dan konten notifikasiRecipient email address and notification content
Otoritas HukumLegal Authorities Kewajiban hukum / perintah pengadilanLegal obligation / court order Data yang diminta sesuai perintah yang sahData requested under a valid legal order

Seluruh pihak ketiga diwajibkan memiliki standar keamanan data yang memadai dan tidak diizinkan menggunakan data Anda untuk tujuan lain di luar yang telah ditetapkan.All third parties are required to maintain adequate data security standards and are not permitted to use your data for any purpose beyond what has been specified.

6. Keamanan Data6. Data Security

Kami menerapkan langkah-langkah keamanan teknis dan organisasional sebagai berikut:We implement the following technical and organisational security measures:

  • Enkripsi kata sandi:Password encryption: menggunakan bcrypt dengan salt factor yang disesuaikan secara berkalabcrypt with a periodically adjusted salt factor
  • Enkripsi transport:Transport encryption: seluruh komunikasi antara browser dan server menggunakan TLS 1.2 atau lebih tinggi (HTTPS)all browser-to-server communications use TLS 1.2 or higher (HTTPS)
  • Isolasi sesi:Session isolation: sesi pengguna dibatasi waktu dan di-invalidasi setelah logoutuser sessions are time-limited and invalidated on logout
  • Kontrol akses berbasis peran:Role-based access control: halaman dan API dilindungi oleh middleware autentikasi dan otorisasipages and APIs are protected by authentication and authorisation middleware
  • Audit log:Audit log: seluruh tindakan administratif dan pemindaian dicatat dengan timestamp dan identitas penggunaall administrative actions and scans are logged with timestamp and user identity
  • Basis data lokal:Local database: data scan disimpan di SQLite yang diakses hanya oleh proses server CyberINKscan data is stored in SQLite accessible only by the CyberINK server process
  • Pembaruan keamanan:Security updates: dependensi platform diperbarui secara berkala untuk menutup kerentanan yang diketahuiplatform dependencies are regularly updated to address known vulnerabilities

7. Retensi Data7. Data Retention

Jenis DataData Type Masa RetensiRetention Period CatatanNotes
Data akun aktifActive account data Selama akun aktifWhile account is active Dihapus 90 hari setelah penghapusan akunDeleted 90 days after account deletion
Hasil scan & engagementScan results & engagements Selama akun aktif + 90 hariWhile account is active + 90 days Dapat diekspor sebelum akun dihapusCan be exported before account deletion
Log akses serverServer access logs 90 hari90 days Dihapus otomatis dengan rotasi logAutomatically deleted via log rotation
Riwayat pembayaranPayment history 5 tahun5 years Kewajiban perpajakan IndonesiaIndonesian tax obligation
LocalStorage browser Dikelola oleh browser AndaManaged by your browser Dapat dihapus dari pengaturan browserClearable from browser settings

8. Hak-Hak Pengguna8. User Rights

Sesuai UU PDP No. 27 Tahun 2022, Anda memiliki hak berikut:Under UU PDP No. 27 of 2022, you have the following rights:

  • Hak Akses:Right of Access: meminta salinan data pribadi yang kami simpan tentang Andarequest a copy of the personal data we hold about you
  • Hak Koreksi:Right to Rectification: meminta koreksi atas data yang tidak akurat atau tidak lengkaprequest correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Hak Penghapusan:Right to Erasure: meminta penghapusan data pribadi Anda (kecuali data yang wajib disimpan berdasarkan hukum)request deletion of your personal data (except data required by law to be retained)
  • Hak Portabilitas:Right to Portability: menerima data Anda dalam format yang dapat dibaca mesin (JSON/CSV)receive your data in a machine-readable format (JSON/CSV)
  • Hak Keberatan:Right to Object: menolak pemrosesan data untuk tujuan tertentu (misalnya komunikasi pemasaran)object to processing for specific purposes (e.g. marketing communications)
  • Hak Penarikan Persetujuan:Right to Withdraw Consent: mencabut persetujuan kapan saja tanpa mempengaruhi pemrosesan yang sudah dilakukan sebelumnyawithdraw consent at any time without affecting prior processing

Untuk mengajukan permintaan terkait hak-hak di atas, kirimkan email ke ngclaire75@gmail.com dengan subjek "Data Subject Request — [Jenis Permintaan]". Kami akan merespons dalam 3 hari kerja.To submit a request relating to the above rights, email ngclaire75@gmail.com with the subject "Data Subject Request — [Request Type]". We will respond within 3 business days.

9. Cookie dan Penyimpanan Lokal9. Cookies and Local Storage

CyberINK menggunakan mekanisme penyimpanan berikut di perangkat Anda:CyberINK uses the following storage mechanisms on your device:

MekanismeMechanism KategoriCategory TujuanPurpose Dapat Dinonaktifkan?Can Be Disabled?
Session Cookie EssentialEssential Autentikasi sesi login pengguna — diperlukan agar platform berfungsiUser login session authentication — required for the platform to function Tidak (essential)No (essential)
localStorage (preferensi) FungsionalFunctional Menyimpan preferensi tata letak dashboard, status filter, dan target scan terakhir di browser AndaStores dashboard layout preferences, filter state, and last scan target in your browser Ya — pilih "Hanya yang Diperlukan" di banner persetujuan cookieYes — choose "Necessary Only" in the cookie consent banner
sessionStorage EssentialEssential Menyimpan status scan yang sedang berjalan selama tab browser aktifStores in-progress scan state while the browser tab is active Ya — ditutup otomatis saat tab ditutupYes — automatically cleared when the tab is closed
localStorage (persetujuan) EssentialEssential Menyimpan pilihan persetujuan cookie per akun penggunaStores cookie consent choice per user account Tidak — diperlukan untuk mengingat pilihan AndaNo — required to remember your choice

Kami tidak menggunakan cookie pelacak pihak ketiga atau cookie analitik komersial. Saat pertama kali menggunakan platform, Anda akan ditampilkan banner persetujuan cookie dengan dua pilihan: Terima Semua (semua penyimpanan fungsional aktif) atau Hanya yang Diperlukan (preferensi lokal dibersihkan dan tidak disimpan). Pilihan ini disimpan per akun dan dapat diubah kapan saja melalui tautan di bawah.We do not use third-party tracking cookies or commercial analytics cookies. On your first visit, a cookie consent banner appears with two options: Accept All (all functional storage enabled) or Necessary Only (local preferences cleared and not saved). This choice is stored per account and can be changed at any time via the link below.

Ubah Preferensi Cookie AndaManage Your Cookie Preferences

10. Transfer Data Internasional10. International Data Transfers

Beberapa layanan yang kami gunakan (seperti Anthropic untuk model AI dan Cloudflare untuk CDN) berlokasi di luar Indonesia. Transfer data tersebut dilakukan dengan jaminan kontraktual yang memadai, termasuk Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) dan kebijakan privasi masing-masing penyedia. Kami hanya mentransfer data yang diperlukan untuk fungsi spesifik layanan tersebut.Some services we use (such as Anthropic for AI models and Cloudflare for CDN) are located outside Indonesia. Such data transfers are carried out with adequate contractual safeguards, including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and each provider's own privacy policy. We only transfer data necessary for that service's specific function.

11. Perubahan Kebijakan Privasi11. Changes to This Privacy Policy

Kami dapat memperbarui Kebijakan Privasi ini sewaktu-waktu. Perubahan material akan diberitahukan melalui:We may update this Privacy Policy at any time. Material changes will be communicated via:

  • Notifikasi di dalam platform minimal 14 hari sebelum berlakuIn-platform notification at least 14 days before the change takes effect
  • Email ke alamat yang terdaftar (jika tersedia)Email to the registered address (if available)

Penggunaan platform setelah tanggal berlakunya perubahan dianggap sebagai penerimaan atas kebijakan yang diperbarui. Jika Anda tidak menyetujui perubahan, Anda dapat menghapus akun sebelum tanggal berlaku.Continued use of the platform after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy. If you do not agree, you may delete your account before the effective date.

12. Kontak dan Pengaduan12. Contact and Complaints

Untuk pertanyaan, permintaan terkait data, atau pengaduan privasi:For questions, data requests, or privacy complaints:

  • Email DPO:DPO Email: ngclaire75@gmail.com
  • Waktu respons: paling lambat 3 hari kerjaResponse time: within 3 business days

Jika Anda merasa hak privasi Anda tidak ditangani dengan memadai, Anda berhak mengajukan aduan kepada Kementerian Komunikasi dan Digital Republik Indonesia (Komdigi) sebagai otoritas pengawas perlindungan data.If you feel your privacy rights have not been adequately addressed, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Indonesian Ministry of Communication and Digital (Komdigi) as the data protection supervisory authority.

Kami menggunakan session cookie esensial dan localStorage untuk preferensi dashboard. Terima Semua atau pilih Hanya yang Diperlukan. We use an essential session cookie and localStorage for dashboard preferences. Accept All or choose Necessary Only.  PrivasiPrivacy
